title: rainbow`s 3D Trident
description: Full vanilla! Stunning custom model that brings your underwater weapon to life.
body: **Check out my other resource packs!** [![rainbow`s 3D Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Op0pojUo/de1eba66a759ae5dd6059c9c5b2fc6fd4b18364f_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rainbows-3d-mace) **Rainbow's 3D Trident brings the new weapon to life with a custom 3D model!** **This resource pack is allowed to be used in modpacks.** ## 📥 Installation Drop into resource packs folder and activate in-game. ## ✨ Features: - Stunning 3D trident in first-person (hand) and third-person view - Keeps 3D icon in inventory/GUI and shelf/frame - 100% vanilla-friendly, no mods required - Supports Minecraft 1.21.11>! - ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/493942e89aeacb5410bbd12c1dad3c4e69c55af3.png) ## **Will be updated soon!** **Preview shaders: Complementary Unbound** **Preview Gallery shows it in action! Feedback welcome. <3**
